name: NameKetchup
description: Check domain + username on popular social media Tool: https://nameketchup.com. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #1133 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map NameKetchup output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
